name: widget-platform-hooks
description: Deterministic reliability hooks for the widget-platform comparator loop and publish flow. Five hooks: (1) intercepts inspect_screen's device-tree result and uploads it directly to widget-platform's backend, handing the calling model back a small reference id instead of the full tree - avoids the tool-call-argument retyping failures that otherwise happen when a large device tree has to be reproduced as text; (2) generates a real, scannable QR code for a widget's deeplink the moment launch_widget_on_device creates it, saved locally with an instruction to include it in the final report; (3) reinforces advance_comparator_loop's own round_report field with a loud, separate instruction so the mandatory per-round score reporting doesn't silently stay buried in a JSON blob; (4) hard-blocks publish_widget calls that pass style_request_type="updation" without generation_id - a shape that silently downgrades to "addition" server-side and creates a duplicate widget instead of updating the intended one; (5) reinforces publish_widget's response with a loud reminder whenever a call actually updated an already-published widget in place, so that isn't reported as done without confirming it was intended.
